User Story: As a student, I want to login via university ID so I can access my profile.
As a teacher, I want to see a list of who is present right now in my class.
As the system, I want to check if a student is within 10m of the classroom for geofencing.
As a student, I want my phone to notify me when my attendance gets marked.
As an admin, I want to be able to manually fix attendance if there's a technical error.
